textByHash.73b8e55dc43038029ce7c01878b300db759d4411: That I am adventurer. King Lathas told me to expect you. I assume he has told you our goal?
textByHash.8241d996b318a053657d0da951fb5dfa2210bba6: These caves are different... There is a darkness in there unlike any other. You can feel it as you wind your way round the stalagmites... an icy chill that penetrates the very fabric of your being...
textByHash.2ae77f2321227f5e62a5b7df737590b5250e78d1: I have. I didn't go far though, nor did I stay for long. People change in these caves...
textByHash.387ed1f5965c95918e3c376a13fef9d0f04d4268: Okay traveller, I'll catch up with you by the bridge.
textByHash.00fa1c77df8732acdde7e4c39d3d2c079d40c388: I remember one warrior. His name was Randas. He stood tall and proud like an elven king...
textByHash.323cb5f8cd3ffd26a13b371027adbc3d1e7382c0: That same pride made him vulnerable. Randas' worthy desire to be a great and mighty warrior also made him corruptible.
textByHash.870c863f6d8f56a69340c76dc0282f3cd0dde800: Within the cave, he heard the voice of Zamorak himself...
textByHash.76e1fafc669469030af9f918994131f259352710: Zamorak showed him a way to achieve his goals by appealing to that most base and dark nature... One that resides in all of us.
textByHash.589986f836008c468033196e2af88f45b75ef5c9: Anyway, head on in when you're ready. You'll soon come to a bridge, I will catch up with you there.
textByHash.449d6943dd8e9701e417af0e984ca0e1367452be: Nothing exciting, just keeping an eye out.
textByHash.2fce38e6ba0e98967eebe084d85f5a4ba690e915: Hello adventurer. We seem to have a bit of an issue ahead of us. The bridge is up and I can't see another way across.
textByHash.a511f9ca2a567007d640ee9d5252ec81f67c9a5f: I'm afraid not. This is the furthest I've ever been. It does look like someone was here before us though, there's the remains of a camp.
textByHash.afeaa0449e3fcc25a372057c24036386cb75bd6f: I had a look through their things and found some cloth along with the charred remains of some arrows.
textByHash.d14315dd6f5551b542837fd4447517b301969ff6: There's plenty more cloth by the fire. I also found the remains of a book...
textByHash.e61caba9ec7eca98818b5241029905e8b36f9b40: It seems to be written by the adventurer Randas. Have a look.
textByHash.1074e08043cc91648bfc14aa5286964742f991de: Hello adventurer. I'll catch up with you further on. Have a look by the fire if you need more cloth.
textByHash.425440e936052add5cde2df78937209c2c74e7f5: Do you hear them? The voices tell me things.
textByHash.93d14e9627e35dc7746c5dd2d92bf6b0c90eb76a: The path of the righteous man is beset on all sides by the iniquities of the selfish and the tyranny of evil men.
textByHash.f4c1bb85f1cdd62f584372750e8bd2f71b9c296f: So many paths to choose... Here we must all take our own path.
textByHash.c2fa883e4148f41d19f9766bc4595df9ad217e32: The voices, they've been telling me things...
textByHash.553f52aafa7224f41d185fb99d97af6d74f8f318: Don't be friend. Anyway, do you know the definition of insanity?
textByHash.1266d5722d5ad67a1a93c879326887b8f96e5fba: The definition of insanity is doing the same thing over and over, expecting things to change.
textByHash.fdcd7a0b40244a60b4fb4af614a97dcad6732a10: I spent years doing the same thing, day in and day out. I always wanted more but I never got it. Now, I finally see why...
textByHash.c67c8280241aaef3c8367d323384c937c5c61477: You see, once I was insane. But now... now I am finally free...
textByHash.a8104ff834bdaff8c3d83039bff7fa669589542f: Ah, you've arrived. We've been waiting for you.
textByHash.e3c909f1997e72ab62e7088c57bafcad21826608: Leave? But this is my home now. Home with my lord. He talks to me, he's my friend.
textByHash.a7c9c9d2de4fb40aa4a7e81509155ea40639191d: Not now, we're all the same down here. There's just you and those dwarves left.
textByHash.59b640fdef07aca4586b131fa1f0a6c970551856: Foolish dwarves, still believing that they can resist. No one resists Iban.
textByHash.4840bb49d19330f0038130fc467a595aa63fda13: You could help! Deep down you know you want it! I know you already dealt with those Paladins. Now you just need to kill the dwarves!
textByHash.06af81950379810644e58734b3b83392f24a56be: Head south and through the tunnel. You'll find the dwarves at the other end. Go slay them. Slay them for our lord!
textByHash.d45f3dd55299fa883bfc739bdb4b031c7c039603: Nice job killing those Paladins. You're much closer to his side now. Perhaps you could kill those dwarves as well. That would really please him.
textByHash.1a70184acdbc498c4ae1b46447ca20373b7c2e37: Adventurer, where am I? I can't remember a thing!
textByHash.4c4ffae7895e2d5d7395c4e941f93ef3165c0b47: What? Of course, the voices... But they've stopped. What happened?
textByHash.e85ea690a6508dd220260ce8a6a456e9df5df57c: You've done well! Thank you for saving me.
textByHash.6d840c69656e329c0dc46057f9a088997b1c58cd: But what about you, adventurer? Did the voices not affect you?
textByHash.fae2cc6d6ef3a149f83f2352121c2b6d24d91939: I see. Well we must now inform the king. Follow me, I'll lead you out.
textByHash.055dd29b902ccd8739a45121ed31c148c8928b8a: Always a pleasure. Have you informed the king about Iban?
textByHash.0114ccb9861570f2a4f43c382d84b59aa4da8bfe: This is no time to linger. The King must know that Iban is dead. This is a truly historical moment for Ardougne.
textByHash.72ee45e87801f21546ee9542ef1d58297bc041be: I wouldn't go in there if I were you. Only death awaits those who enter that place.
textByHash.6725932f7bd2b7661b99c6c6d4f2a9ee898559cb: I'm good... just keeping an eye out.
textByHash.4d3e262f6a786a3c04bcf59d33da6284bc992558: I found this by the way. I guess you'll be wanting it back.
